sic_mapping_selection_rule.effective_time_selection: among rows covering the SIC, the latest effective_from <= close t governs (NULL effective_from = always-effective); range boundaries inclusive
sic_mapping_selection_rule.sector_lookup: the row whose [sic_start, sic_end] inclusive range contains the security's PIT SIC (from sic_observations.accepted_utc <= close t)
sic_mapping_selection_rule.sector_to_etf: the sector_etf column (11 SPDR select-sector ETFs); one ETF per sector

output.large_records: decision/disposition shards may stay out of git; identities+manifests committed

policies.batch_policy: single-process == multi-shard == restart, byte-identical after canonical ordering
policies.checkpoint_policy: atomic per-shard completion; completed-shard SHA-256 recorded; non-overwriting
policies.execution_enrichment: NOT a full run; only a preregistered mechanical sample proving the seam
policies.failure_policy: raw exception / unregistered refusal / reconciliation mismatch / post-dev row / validation-OOS reference -> STOP, no repair/tune/reinterpret
policies.performance_quarantine: signal values emitted but never ranked/interpreted; only implementation diagnostics permitted
policies.resource_limits: single-process default; a second shard configuration + a restart run for invariance
policies.restart_policy: resume from last completed shard; never overwrite/duplicate/skip; identical final manifest
policies.sharding: contiguous session-ordinal blocks (independent units -> shard-invariant after canonical merge)
policies.unit_of_computation: permanent_security_id x decision_session -> exactly one terminal disposition

security_types.included: US-listed operating-company common equity + governed share classes (Ruling 10)

selection_rule.authorized_row_set: universe_month between 2013-01-01 and 2019-10-01 (82 governing months covering dev sessions 2013-01-02..2019-10-02)
selection_rule.availability_convention: universe_month date is the reconstitution availability timestamp
selection_rule.future_universe_month: excluded; can never influence session t
selection_rule.governing_universe_month: max registered universe_month whose availability (= the universe_month date) is <= close(session t)
selection_rule.membership_from: ONLY the rows of that single governing month
selection_rule.missing_governing_month: INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT is NOT used; a missing governing month is a universe-integrity failure -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS (frozen)
selection_rule.pre_window_seed: none required (the 2013-01 reconstitution governs the first dev session)
selection_rule.survivorship: PIT, survivorship-free; never a present-day constituent list
